title: Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-11
content:
# Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-11

## Focus for Today
Revenue-first Vancouver real estate execution:
1) warm lead pipeline movement
2) past-client referral activation
3) one consumer-facing local authority post
4) COI outreach with coffee conversion

## 1) Warm Lead Follow-up Block (10)

**Message A (status + intent):**
"Hey [Name] — quick check-in: are you still looking to [buy/sell] in the next 3–6 months, or has timing shifted? I can send a quick Vancouver micro-market update for your area."

**Message B (call conversion):**
"If useful, let’s do a 10-minute game plan call this week so you’ve got a clear next step. I can do [Option 1] or [Option 2]."

## 2) Past-Client Sphere Check-in Block (6)

"Hey [Name] — hope you’ve been great. Quick ask: if anyone in your circle is thinking about buying/selling in Vancouver this year, I’m happy to be a no-pressure resource. If useful, I can also send a neighborhood value snapshot."

## 3) Consumer-Facing Post (publish today)

**Hook:** "Vancouver buyers in 2026: the best deals are won before offer day."

**Post draft:**
"If you’re buying in Vancouver this spring, focus on these 3 moves first:\n\n1) Get financing clarity before touring\n2) Track micro-neighborhood pricing, not city averages\n3) Pre-build your offer strategy so you can move fast\n\nComment ‘BUYER’ and I’ll send the exact prep checklist I use with active clients."

## 4) COI Outreach Block (3 intros, 1 coffee ask)

"Hey [Name] — I’m tightening my Vancouver referral circle (mortgage/legal/inspection) so clients get faster, better support. Open to a quick coffee next week to trade notes on what buyers/sellers are struggling with in 2026?"

## 5) End-of-Day Scorecard

Track and log:
- Warm follow-ups sent: _ / 10
- Past-client check-ins sent: _ / 6
- Consumer posts published: _ / 1
- COI intros sent: _ / 3
- Coffee chats booked: _ / 1
- Replies received: _
- Calls booked: _
- Consults booked: _
